caseStudies.title: AI Quality Inspection Implementation
caseStudies.challenge: A traditional manufacturer in central Taiwan suffered from high miss rates in manual visual inspection, leading to defective products reaching customers and constant complaints.
caseStudies.solution: 90-day rollout of an AI vision inspection system, paired with process reengineering and staff training.

caseStudies.title: AI Customer Service System
caseStudies.challenge: A mid-size e-commerce company faced high customer service costs with 70% repetitive inquiries, and declining customer satisfaction scores.
caseStudies.solution: Six-month phased AI chatbot rollout with human escalation paths, knowledge base build-out, and seamless handoff mechanisms.

caseStudies.title: SME ESG Getting Started
caseStudies.challenge: A supply-chain manufacturer received ESG reporting requirements from a major buyer but had no internal baseline or know-how to begin.
caseStudies.solution: Three-month engagement covering carbon footprint inventory through social impact metrics, establishing a measurable ESG framework and disclosure process.
